ptzCameras.notes: 1-inch Exmor RS CMOS, 20x. Focal range 8.8–176.0mm back-calculated from 24–480mm (35mm equiv) using sensorWidthMM/36.0 scale factor. hFOVWide 75.0° published by Sony (official help guide, 'Approx. 75°'). hFOVTele 4.3° calculated from maxFocalLengthMM (calc). (W) variant is white — identical specs. Lens module (8.8–176mm, 1-inch sensor) appears shared with Panasonic AW-HE145/UE160/UE150 series — same hFOVWide within 0.1°. Current.

1-inch Exmor R CMOS, 12x Zeiss Vario-Sonnar T*. Clear Image Zoom extends to 24x (HD). HFOV from Sony specs / B&H. Focal lengths derived from HFOV and sensor width. 3G-SDI + HDMI output. Discontinued. (Duplicate entry removed v1.2.1 — second entry claimed shared optics with BRC-X1000 at 9.3–111.6mm with hFOVTele 6.8°; kept this entry's Sony/B&H-sourced values.)
3-CMOS (3× 1/2-inch Exmor), 14x. Both HFOV values calculated (†) using 6.4mm sensor width per standard 1/2-inch dimension. Discontinued.
1-inch Exmor R CMOS, 12x. HFOV 64.6° manufacturer-published (Sony pro spec sheet). Focal range 9.3-111.6mm. (Addendum A Section A.4)
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 20x. BRC-X400 and SRG-X400 share identical sensor and lens specs. Focal range 4.4-88mm. (Addendum A Section A.4)
1/2.8-inch Exmor CMOS, 30x. Shares 4.3–129mm OEM lens module with JVC KY-PZ100 and BirdDog P200. hFOVTele 2.3° calculated (†). Discontinued.
Same sensor and 30x lens module as SRG-300H. hFOVTele 2.3° calculated (†). Discontinued.
1/2.5-inch CMOS, 12x. HFOV 70.0° verified against Sony SRG-X120 spec sheet. Focal range approx 4.4-52.8mm. (Addendum A Section A.4)
Same sensor and lens as BRC-X400. (Addendum A Section A.4)
